data.content:
Scope refinement from follow-up design discussion:
- the builtin rename work should fit a model where Knots owns the knot-type-to-workflow registry
- Loom workflows remain independent and should not declare supported knot types
- builtin workflows ship as Loom assets and are installed/registered for their knot types without deleting user-installed workflows
- `explore` is expected to become a first-class knot type, so avoid baking future assumptions that exploration is just a profile inside the renamed work workflow
